attributes.content:
## Overview

The Privacy Policy card gives the workspace a structured home for privacy policy with data collection practices, rights, retention, and jurisdiction.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Privacy Policy acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Document]]** -- Privacy Policy can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Privacy Policy can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Signature]]** -- Signature can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Privacy Policy.
- **[[Alert]]** -- Alert can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Privacy Policy.
- **[[Report]]** -- Privacy Policy can feed rollups and summaries that surface trends, status, or outcomes.
- **[[Legal Contract]]** -- Legal Contract can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Privacy Policy.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Privacy Policy as the structured home for privacy policy with data collection practices, rights, retention, and jurisdiction and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Privacy Policy when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Privacy Policy stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Privacy Policy
cardInfo.summary: Privacy policy with data collection practices, rights, retention, and jurisdiction.
